chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 49 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case. 12.10.2023 Petitioner, namely, Javed Masih present in person Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Najaf Ali Janweri, Accounts Clerk, Municipal Committee, Khairpur is present on behalf of Chief Municipal Officer, Khairpur and has filed a statement along with original Cheque No.41363560 for an amount of Rs.200,000/- which is handed over to the petitioner in Court. The official present further undertakes that the remaining total amount would be paid to the petitioner within two months. The petitioner who is present in person, being satisfied, seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI Judge Judge ARBROHI
